Antigravity Conversation Logs

Exported on 2026-03-01 12:26:42

Index

  • Implementation plan for Dockerized Django Middleware and Frontend.
  • Implementation plan to enhance security and improve migration readiness for the real API, now including integration tests in the verification plan.
  • Comprehensive implementation plan for chat polish features, including model updates for interactive citations, robust history loading, and consistent guest query tracking.
  • Drafting security implementation plan for both Frontend and Backend including CORS, SSL pinning, and root detection
  • 05deb5ea-a666-4044-87d9-dfba90c48d8d
  • 0d0b9beb-3259-456b-bdc3-044d09fca90e
  • Task list for fixing lint issues in the project.
  • Plan to fix all 11 ai-flutter-rules violations: restructure models into domain layer, add Citation type to replace List<dynamic>, add doc comments to all public APIs, add dispose() methods, extract helper methods into private widget classes, move marionette_flutter to dev_dependencies, and fix typo. Verification via flutter analyze, dart format, and all 7 existing test files.
  • Comprehensive frontend audit report covering: (1) static analysis results (0 errors), (2) all 25 tests passing, (3) gap analysis between DevSpec #3 and current implementation identifying 25 specific gaps, (4) coding rules compliance check with 7 minor deviations, (5) test coverage analysis with missing areas identified, (6) dependency audit comparing pubspec.yaml vs DevSpec requirements, and (7) prioritized recommendations (P0/P1/P2).
  • 1257eb3c-588a-4f30-aa85-64d3cc25f1bd
  • Instructions on how to run the AI Tinder static web project.
  • Comprehensive plan to implement End-to-End Encryption (E2EE) in the spiritual Q&A platform, focusing on client-side key derivation and data encryption.
  • Comprehensive guide on Flutter testing strategy covering Unit, Widget, and Integration tests. Contains examples for ProviderContainer, WidgetTester overrides, and the Robot pattern for integration tests.
  • 1a4f5ac8-4e0b-4ff2-aee1-130ac744f616
  • 1ba40e23-be74-4f99-a121-1526762fb333
  • Task list for launching the app on a Pixel emulator.
  • Implementation plan to update project rules with lessons learned from previous conversations (security, integration testing, and mock logic).
  • Updated plan to use main_dev.dart and standard dependencies.
  • Final task breakdown showing 100% completion in all phases.
  • Expanded implementation plan covering two features: (1) Password Change — re-wrap AK under new LMK for authenticated users, with UI on SettingsScreen; (2) Forgot Password — recovery key generated at registration, stored as RecoveryWrappedAccountKey, used via LoginScreen's Forgot Password button. Includes full test matrix for both flows, file change summary, and crypto mock upgrades.
  • Marking test execution as complete and shifting to coverage generation.
  • Implementation plan for adding swipe gestures, double-tap, and powering control buttons.
  • Frontend state report and enhancement suggestions.
  • Implementation plan to fix the guest query limit display bug.
  • 36aa8b12-664c-4195-9fb2-235c9099cb5a
  • Plan to unify the dev container environment. It involves creating a single Dockerfile with both Python and Node.js, and updating devcontainer.json to mount the project root.
  • Refined implementation plan that enhances the existing `envied` and `Dio` infrastructure. It addresses a potential infinite loop in token refresh and implements missing DTOs for Auth and Chat features, following the provided workflow's principles while avoiding regressions.
  • Implementation plan for the Hash Table Organization (Lexicon) project. Includes details on the Lexicon class, Hash Table with quadratic probing, Array management, and command processing.
  • Implementation plan to update project documentation to reflect recent changes in security (E2EE), architecture (dev entry point), and testing patterns.
  • Implementation plan to fix the unit test failures.
  • Plan to add VS Code Dev Containers support.
  • A detailed, step-by-step implementation plan for refactoring the project to reduce redundancies, improve modularity, and use standard libraries correctly, compliant with project rules.
  • Plan to fix 'Null is not a subtype of Future<SecretKey>' error in app_router_test.dart by using FakeCryptographyService instead of MockCryptographyService.
  • Implementation plan for updating project-specific AI rules with lessons learned from recent debugging.
  • Gap analysis for migrating the Flutter frontend from mock repositories to real API integration. Covers: what's already done (abstract interfaces, DI providers, Dio + interceptor, secure storage, env config), what needs to be built (JSON serialization on 4 domain models, HttpAuthRepository, HttpChatRepository, complete token refresh stub, swap 2 providers, update .env, error handling alignment), and a prioritized migration checklist with effort estimates.
  • 4914ff73-9de9-463f-8c99-e91e2cf8922b
  • Implementation plan for conversation history, "New Conversation" button fixes, and account settings including account deletion.
  • Task breakdown for verifying the DevSpec 3 gap analysis walkthrough
  • 4c1e1870-9851-4f78-b07d-a2e0a44b3d5a
  • Implementation plan to fix IDE warnings and info messages. 1. Fix type mismatch in `env.dart`. 2. Replace deprecated `onHttpClientCreate` with `createHttpClient` in `dio_provider.dart`. 3. Verify fixes with `dart analyze`.
  • A guide on how to implement WCAG accessibility testing in the Flutter application.
  • Comprehensive Test Plan mapping DevSpec requirements to test cases.
  • Implementation plan for a Python script to export all conversations from the workspace into a formatted PDF. The plan includes the search strategy for logs, text extraction from binary files, and report generation.
  • Implementation plan to fix 24 failing tests across 3 root causes: missing expandKey, unstubbed mocks, and pumpAndSettle timeout.
  • Fixing duplicate key collision in SettingsScreen history list.
  • 5debf923-986c-486c-b9fc-d5b7df64560d
  • Plan to refactor the Dev Container setup by removing redundant manual installations of Python and Node.js from the Dockerfile and relying on Dev Container Features.
  • Plan for rewriting immich-server in Rust.
  • Root cause analysis and fix plan for 2 flaky integration tests. chat_polish_test.dart fails because pumpAndSettle doesn't advance Future.delayed timers in mock repos. settings_test.dart fails because the export callback's 500ms async delay completes after the snackbar assertion runs. Both fixes add explicit pump() calls to advance past mock delays before assertions.
  • P3: Frontend Development readiness report summarizing implementation status, design assets, and missing components.
  • Implementation plan to add relevant untracked files to git.
  • Task checklist for extracting business-specific hardcoded values into a centralized AppStrings constants file and updating all references.
  • Implementation plan to stabilize unit tests by properly disposing ProviderContainers and to increase domain model coverage through serialization tests. Also includes a strategy for unified coverage reporting.
  • Implementation plan to resolve negative guest query counts by clamping values and preemptively checking limits before making mocked repository calls.
  • Tracking progress of running integration tests.
  • Plan to update input text color to black during typing.
  • Implementation plan to fix integration test failures in `settings_test.dart` and `password_rotation_test.dart`. Includes refactoring of test initialization, overriding `cryptographyServiceProvider` with `FakeCryptographyService`, and replacing `pumpAndSettle()` with directed `pump()` calls where infinite animations (like the loading state of the Register button) are likely. Also includes adding explicit `ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).clearSnackBars()` calls between steps.
  • Task checklist for fixing the rate limit banner issue after login.
  • Finalized implementation plan for client-side security hardening. Includes Zero-Log Policy for sensitive data redaction and implementation of Strict Certificate Pinning for MitM protection. Backend-dependent tasks have been moved to the project's security roadmap.
  • Plan to bring important tests under version control and clean up untracked log files by updating .gitignore.
  • 82b89944-e027-40b5-8909-9b0dfdc9b42e
  • Implementation plan for the AI Chat Application, focusing on the Backend Core and Auth first.
  • 8999a2b2-e526-4beb-a05a-45bff3a8e86d
  • Implementation plan to track important files and ignore temporary artifacts.
  • Implementation plan to centralize all business-specific constants and strings into `AppStrings`, ensuring a clean separation from technical configurations in `Env` and `AppTheme`.
  • Tracking Git branch creation and environment setup.
  • Remove `RUN npm install -g yarn` from Dockerfile as it fails because node feature is installed after Dockerfile build. Rely on node feature for yarn.
  • Detailed implementation plan for syncing the Flutter frontend with DevSpec #3. Covers 6 new files (StorageService, MockStorageService, HttpInterceptor, TokenPair, AuthState, Validators), modifications to 7 existing files (3 models, login_screen, home_screen, pubspec, tests), 2 new test files, and updates to 2 existing test files. Organized by P0/P1/P2 priority with explicit verification commands.
  • Implementation plan for verifying integration tests on Windows.
  • a1b6cc3b-53ce-4147-9089-622de336c0e5
  • Technical plan for updating Docusaurus documentation.
  • Updated plan with USWDS color specs
  • Detailed implementation plan for Phase 1 of the Real API integration (infrastructure setup).
  • Downgrade dev container Python version to 3.10 to fix build timeouts.
  • Comprehensive review of Flutter project packages, assessing maintenance status, publisher reputation, and identifying deprecated or abandoned packages.
  • Detailed impact analysis of updating outdated and discontinued Flutter packages in the project.
  • cc75ba46-d03d-4306-96fe-8225b755f534
  • cde0e7f2-42e7-4885-a583-b85e81c46428
  • Updated plan to include a unified Dev Container with Docker-from-Docker capabilities.
  • Production-grade documentation strategy using Docusaurus and Scalar. Focuses on the frontend initially, with dedicated guides for Architecture, State Management, Design System, Testing, and API Integration. Includes Architectural Decision Records (ADRs).
  • A high-level roadmap for the Sacred Wisdom frontend, outlining the transition from mock repositories to real API integration, implementing local persistence for guest limits, and polishing the user experience with onboarding and accessibility features.
  • Exhaustive plan to remove all identified unused packages and cleanup associated configurations.
  • Frontend Development Plan (Phase 1). Focus: Replicating `Figma_Generated_UI` in Flutter. - Analyze React Source (Routes, Components, Tailwind styles). - Map to Flutter Widgets (Material 3). - Implement basic pages (Home, Chat, Login).
  • d8d2c589-46d4-43c5-9cec-3f4da3b67361
  • Plan to overhaul the UI to match Figma wireframes, including a new theme, authentication screen, and chat interface.
  • Implementation plan to add untracked important files (workflows, docs, tests, tools) to Git tracking.
  • Impact analysis for upgrading and replacing discontinued packages in the frontend project. Focuses on lucide_icons, share_plus, and shared_preferences.
  • Plan to create a project-specific lessons-learned rules file at `.agents/rules/ai-rules-project.md` that captures recurring failure patterns and their solutions from 20 previous conversations. The file will cover: build_runner issues on Windows, Flutter testing pitfalls (pumpAndSettle, fake async, widget tests), deprecated API mappings, Riverpod/Freezed code generation, project architecture quick-reference, and integration test environment setup.
  • Review of the cs698-repo repository, analyzing structure, documentation, and issues.
  • e1248d01-d8de-4a92-972c-19bbae7f12b3
  • Implementation plan for the LMK (Local Master Key) rotation protocol in the authentication system. Includes domain interface updates, mock repository implementation, and a comprehensive verification plan using unit tests.
  • Scaffold Flutter application with Riverpod, Dio, and GoRouter.
  • Tracking the assessment of the project's compliance with `ai-rules-flutter.md`.
  • Plan to fix frontend navigation by adding auth state listening to GoRouter and updating StartupScreen logic.
  • Implementation plan for a containerized AI chat application using FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, and React.
  • An implementation plan to adapt CryptographyService for better web performance and UX.
  • Plan to fix the failing 'Rate Limit Exceeded and Network Error UI Flow' integration test. Root cause is that guestSessionId is null during sendQuery calls, bypassing rate limit logic. Fix involves making MockChatRepository more testable and making the test more robust with better message submission and timing.
Implementation plan for Dockerized Django Middleware and Frontend.

Expanded implementation plan covering two features: (1) Password Change — re-wrap AK under new LMK for authenticated users, with UI on SettingsScreen; (2) Forgot Password — recovery key generated at registration, stored as RecoveryWrappedAccountKey, used via LoginScreen's Forgot Password button. Includes full test matrix for both flows, file change summary, and crypto mock upgrades.

Gap analysis for migrating the Flutter frontend from mock repositories to real API integration. Covers: what's already done (abstract interfaces, DI providers, Dio + interceptor, secure storage, env config), what needs to be built (JSON serialization on 4 domain models, HttpAuthRepository, HttpChatRepository, complete token refresh stub, swap 2 providers, update .env, error handling alignment), and a prioritized migration checklist with effort estimates.

Root cause analysis and fix plan for 2 flaky integration tests. chat_polish_test.dart fails because pumpAndSettle doesn't advance Future.delayed timers in mock repos. settings_test.dart fails because the export callback's 500ms async delay completes after the snackbar assertion runs. Both fixes add explicit pump() calls to advance past mock delays before assertions.

ASSISTANTex9dy`^|gGH
Implementation plan to fix integration test failures in `settings_test.dart` and `password_rotation_test.dart`. Includes refactoring of test initialization, overriding `cryptographyServiceProvider` with `FakeCryptographyService`, and replacing `pumpAndSettle()` with directed `pump()` calls where infinite animations (like the loading state of the Register button) are likely. Also includes adding explicit `ScaffoldMessenger.of(context).clearSnackBars()` calls between steps.

Finalized implementation plan for client-side security hardening. Includes Zero-Log Policy for sensitive data redaction and implementation of Strict Certificate Pinning for MitM protection. Backend-dependent tasks have been moved to the project's security roadmap.

Detailed implementation plan for syncing the Flutter frontend with DevSpec #3. Covers 6 new files (StorageService, MockStorageService, HttpInterceptor, TokenPair, AuthState, Validators), modifications to 7 existing files (3 models, login_screen, home_screen, pubspec, tests), 2 new test files, and updates to 2 existing test files. Organized by P0/P1/P2 priority with explicit verification commands.

Plan to create a project-specific lessons-learned rules file at `.agents/rules/ai-rules-project.md` that captures recurring failure patterns and their solutions from 20 previous conversations. The file will cover: build_runner issues on Windows, Flutter testing pitfalls (pumpAndSettle, fake async, widget tests), deprecated API mappings, Riverpod/Freezed code generation, project architecture quick-reference, and integration test environment setup.

Plan to fix the failing 'Rate Limit Exceeded and Network Error UI Flow' integration test. Root cause is that guestSessionId is null during sendQuery calls, bypassing rate limit logic. Fix involves making MockChatRepository more testable and making the test more robust with better message submission and timing.
